name: DF Cooling Plant

inputs.description: A number for the temperature of chilled water in the DES in degrees C. (Default: 6).
inputs.name: _chw_setpoint_

inputs.description: A number for the nominal district cooling load in Watts. (Default: 8000).
inputs.name: _cooling_limit_

inputs.description: A number for the nominal chilled water mass flow rate in kg/s. (Default: 10.0).
inputs.name: _chw_mass_flow_

inputs.description: A number for the nominal condenser water mass flow rate in kg/s. (Default: 1.0).
inputs.name: _cw_mass_flow_

inputs.description: A number for the chilled water pump head in Pa. (Default: 250000).
inputs.name: _chw_pump_head_

inputs.description: A number for the condenser water pump head in Pa. (Default: 175000).
inputs.name: _cw_pump_head_

inputs.description: A number for the nominal chilled water (evaporator) side pressure drop in Pa. (Default: 55000).
inputs.name: _chw_press_drop_

inputs.description: A number for the nominal cooling water (condenser) side pressure drop in Pa. (Default: 80000).
inputs.name: _cw_press_drop_

inputs.description: A number for the cooling tower fan power in Watts. (Default: 5000).
inputs.name: _tower_fan_power_

inputs.description: A number for the nominal water temperature difference of the tower in degrees C. (Default: 7).
inputs.name: _tower_delta_temp_

inputs.description: A number for the nominal cooling water inlet temperature in degrees C. (Default: 35).
inputs.name: _cw_inlet_temp_

inputs.description: A number for the design air wet-bulb temperature in degrees C. (Default: 25).
inputs.name: _outdoor_wb_temp_

description:
Create a CoolingPlant object that can be used in a District Energy System (DES).
_
The output of this component can be used with the "DF Fourth Generation
Thermal Loop" component.
-
code:
try:
    from dragonfly_energy.des.plant import CoolingPlant
except ImportError as e:
    raise ImportError('\nFailed to import dragonfly_energy:\n\t{}'.format(e))
try:
    from ladybug_{{cad}}.{{plugin}} import turn_off_old_tag
except ImportError as e:
    raise ImportError('\nFailed to import ladybug_{{cad}}:\n\t{}'.format(e))
turn_off_old_tag(ghenv.Component)


_chw_setpoint_ = _chw_setpoint_ if _chw_setpoint_ is not None else 6
_cooling_limit_ = _cooling_limit_ if _cooling_limit_ is not None else 8000
_chw_mass_flow_ = _chw_mass_flow_ if _chw_mass_flow_ is not None else 10
_cw_mass_flow_ = _cw_mass_flow_ if _cw_mass_flow_ is not None else 10
_chw_pump_head_ = _chw_pump_head_ if _chw_pump_head_ is not None else 250000
_cw_pump_head_ = _cw_pump_head_ if _cw_pump_head_ is not None else 175000
_chw_press_drop_ = _chw_press_drop_ if _chw_press_drop_ is not None else 55000
_cw_press_drop_ = _cw_press_drop_ if _cw_press_drop_ is not None else 80000
_tower_fan_power_ = _tower_fan_power_ if _tower_fan_power_ is not None else 5000
_tower_delta_temp_ = _tower_delta_temp_ if _tower_delta_temp_ is not None else 7
_cw_inlet_temp_ = _cw_inlet_temp_ if _cw_inlet_temp_ is not None else 35
_outdoor_wb_temp_ = _outdoor_wb_temp_ if _outdoor_wb_temp_ is not None else 25


cooling = CoolingPlant(
    chw_setpoint=_chw_setpoint_,
    cooling_limit=_cooling_limit_,
    chw_mass_flow=_chw_mass_flow_,
    cw_mass_flow=_cw_mass_flow_,
    chw_pump_head=_chw_pump_head_,
    cw_pump_head=_cw_pump_head_,
    chw_pressure_drop=_chw_press_drop_,
    cw_pressure_drop=_cw_press_drop_,
    cooling_tower_fan_power=_tower_fan_power_,
    cooling_tower_delta_temperature=_tower_delta_temp_,
    cw_inlet_temperature=_cw_inlet_temp_,
    outdoor_wb_temperature=_outdoor_wb_temp_
)

outputs.description:
A CoolingPlant object that can be plugged into the "DF Fourth
Generation Thermal Loop" component to customize the cooling plant
in the District Energy Simulation (DES).
outputs.name: cooling
